selections.name: Thistle Queen
selections.reason: Top class rating in the field and possesses early speed to dictate terms or sit a perfect trip.

selections.name: Over The Falls
selections.reason: Draws the rail and projects to get a great stalking trip behind the early speed. Consistent performer.

selections.name: Canela Fina
selections.reason: Outside draw keeps her out of trouble; has the late kick to pick up the pieces if the pace gets hot.

selections.name: Princess Em
selections.reason: Figures are a bit lower but can hit the board at a price with a clean trip.

danger_horse.name: Victoria Command
danger_horse.reason: Classy enough to contend if she can find her best form today.

selections.name: Saltmakeshersweet
selections.reason: Coming off a strong win and has the early speed to control the race from the inside post.

selections.name: Spectacular Tango
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field; will be pressing the pace and is the main threat to the top pick.

selections.name: Credit Check
selections.reason: Solid presser who will benefit if the top two duel too hard early.

selections.name: Miss Springsteen
selections.reason: Consistent runner who rarely runs a bad race; good underneath in exotics.

danger_horse.name: Parlay Charlie
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a strong late run if the pace collapses.

races.exotic_strategy: Win Bet #1, Exacta Box 1-2, Trifecta 1,2 / 1,2,4 / ALL

selections.name: Vesper Martini
selections.reason: Top class and speed figures; projects a perfect stalking trip just off the early leaders.

selections.name: Mshawish'girl
selections.reason: Strong class rating and draws outside, allowing for a clean pressing trip.

selections.name: Calling Tillie
selections.reason: Tied for second-highest class rating; dangerous if she gets the right setup.

selections.name: Bokeh
selections.reason: Has the speed to be forwardly placed and can hold on for a share.

danger_horse.name: Secret Valentine
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and solid class make her a threat to hit the board.

selections.name: Fast And Friendly
selections.reason: Lone early speed in the race. Gets a massive pace advantage and should go wire-to-wire.

selections.name: Man's Choice
selections.reason: Best of the rest; will stalk the pace and get first run if the leader falters.

selections.name: Merger
selections.reason: Consistent closer who will be picking up the pieces late.

selections.name: Drill City
selections.reason: Can hit the board underneath with a decent trip.

selections.name: Whiskey Point
selections.reason: Standout speed and class figures in this maiden field; the one to beat.

selections.name: Willing N Abled
selections.reason: First-time starter from a high-percentage barn; rail draw is a plus.

selections.name: Have A Cigar
selections.reason: Has shown flashes of ability and drops into a winnable spot.

selections.name: Nydini
selections.reason: Could show early speed and hang around for a minor award.

danger_horse.name: Kukuk
danger_horse.reason: Has experience and could improve enough to surprise.

selections.name: Holiday Lights
selections.reason: Strong class and speed combination; outside draw allows for a perfect pressing trip.

selections.name: Sharp Az Can Be
selections.reason: Dangerous early speed from the rail; will be tough to catch if left alone.

selections.name: Miss Foxann
selections.reason: Highest raw speed figure in the field; a major threat if she runs to her best.

selections.name: Right Trappe
selections.reason: Solid presser who can capitalize if the pace gets too hot.

danger_horse.name: Mali Bali
danger_horse.reason: Has early speed and could complicate the pace scenario for the #1.

selections.name: Jupiter
selections.reason: Massive class and speed advantage over this field. Looks like a standout.

selections.name: Picaro
selections.reason: Best of the rest; will save ground from the rail and finish well.

selections.name: Saving Heart
selections.reason: Consistent closer who will be passing tired horses late.

selections.name: Drury Lane
selections.reason: Lone early speed; could hold on for a piece if the pace is slow.

selections.name: Lady Lottie
selections.reason: Class standout in this field; projects a perfect stalking trip behind the speed.

selections.name: Spice Ice
selections.reason: Solid late runner who will benefit from a contested pace.

selections.name: City Signs
selections.reason: Outside draw is favorable; can hit the board at a price.

selections.name: Fabulous Clown
selections.reason: Inside draw and tactical speed make her a candidate for the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Dolce Marie
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and solid speed figures make her a threat if she gets a clean trip.
